condition: Full site outage during daylight or major safety/compliance issue
escalation_trigger: No acknowledgment within 4 hours or no restoration plan same day
asset_manager_action: Open issue, estimate lost revenue, request ETA, preserve evidence

condition: Material underperformance, multiple inverters offline, critical data outage
escalate_to: O&M manager or DAS account manager
asset_manager_action: Track lost MWh and push for RCA

condition: Moderate underperformance, tracker issue, sensor/model issue
asset_manager_action: Validate economics of dispatch or model fix

condition: Configuration issue, minor data mapping issue, informational alert
asset_manager_action: Clean up context/config and document exception
